feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,647 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entry.title: tdder
entry.content: Guides AI agents through disciplined coding practices. Language and build-system agnostic core with extensible language/build skills.

entry.title: claude-mnemonic
entry.content: Persistent memory system for Claude Code with SQLite, FTS5, and vector search

entry.title: pbrain
entry.content: Daily-ritual scaffolding for Obsidian — journal, gratitude, fitness, diet, plan-my-day, brainstorm, habits, reminders, monthly-review, weekly-review, organize clippings, and Codex CLI interop. All commands read/write into an Obsidian-synced vault.

entry.title: doc-wiki
entry.content: Documentation wiki generator and maintainer for Claude Code. Bootstrap, ingest, query, lint, refresh — all driven by the doc-wiki skill and 10 namespaced slash commands.

entry.title: adcp-client
entry.content: Adds the /adcp skill for calling AdCP advertising agent tools over MCP or A2A, running protocol compliance scenarios, and querying the AdCP registry. Includes built-in test agents for zero-config use. Backed by the `@adcp/sdk` npm package (formerly `@adcp/client`).

entry.title: contorium
entry.content: Contorium: AI Project Intelligence Layer — project cognition assets for Claude Code via MCP inspect and CLI derive.

entry.title: assumptions
entry.content: Assumption Archaeologist — surfaces load-bearing implicit assumptions baked into code ("always UTC", "already sorted", "user is authenticated here") into a living ASSUMPTIONS.md with stable IDs and a status lifecycle. Command-driven only; never runs automatically, so it never spends tokens unless you ask.

entry.title: agentbus
entry.content: Local message bus for AI agent sessions. Discover other running sessions on your machine and message them directly. SQLite bus, pluggable triggers, MCP channel delivery — no daemon, no network.

entry.title: small-cap-deepdive
entry.content: Use when researching neglected SMALL-CAP US equities for a given investment THEME or a single TICKER: enumerate the theme's small-cap universe from SEC filings (EDGAR full-text search UNIONed with a SIC reverse-recall floor), apply hard mechanical kill-flags (going-concern, death-spiral convertibles, ICFR material weakness, customer/government-program concentration) before any qualitative judgment, pull XBRL financials + Form 4 insider trades + shelf/dilution history, run a mechanical buy_eligible valuation gate (reverse-DCF / EV-EBITDA / NAV with V-shape value-trap vetoes), then run falsifiable deep-dive due diligence with forced disconfirmation and base-rate priors, and rank surviving candidates. A de-risk landmine-scanner, not a buy list; zero buys is a valid output. NOT for large-cap/sell-side coverage, factor/quant screening, trading signals, or execution.

entry.title: sodax-skills
entry.content: sodax-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: e2e-skills
entry.content: AI agent testing toolkit to generate, review, and debug Playwright and Cypress E2E tests. Four agent skills: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration, explicit user approval, and first-run scaffolding of project testing conventions (AGENTS.md E2E section + seed spec) for consistent AI generation across Claude Code, Codex, and Playwright Agents; review existing specs against 24 anti-patterns grouped by P0/P1/P2 severity — P0 must-fix (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, Cypress uncaught:exception suppression, always-passing assertions, bypass patterns, focused test leak, missing assertions, missing auth setup, missing await on expect, missing await on action), P1 should-fix (raw DOM queries, hard-coded sleeps, flaky test patterns, inconsistent POM usage, hardcoded credentials, direct page action API, expect.soft overuse, module-level mutable state in test utilities, unmocked real-backend writes, optimistic UI without call proof), P2 nice-to-fix (YAGNI + zombie specs, manually-captured session-file dependency, fixture ignores render guards); debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/. Built for E2E test automation, flaky test root-cause analysis, false-positive detection, and test smell scanning.

entry.title: claudius
entry.content: Collection of specialized development agents and skills for Claude Code

entry.title: marketing-offers-tool
entry.content: SvelteKit tool for marketing teams to manage aggregator offers (Wolt, Bolt) and track offer performance.

entry.title: developer
entry.content: Build, integrate, and deploy applications on the Autonomi Network with verified guidance for the SDK, CLI, Direct Rust, and MCP paths.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram messaging for Claude Code through the agents-comm-bus daemon

entry.title: agents
entry.content: Skills, plugins, and config for AI coding agents

entry.title: tally-dev-tools
entry.content: Development tools and skills for the Tally project

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: nas-llm
entry.content: LLM Wiki Knowledge Base — planning, ops scripts, and E2E checklist for the DESKTOP-AT1P1UD deployment of nashsu/llm_wiki

entry.title: roborev
entry.content: Agent skills for roborev code review, fix, refine, and response workflows.

entry.title: numberlabs
entry.content: Author and validate numberlabs reconciliation configs locally with the openrecon CLI, then drive them against a live tenant through the Flow Service API MCP server.

entry.title: cman
entry.content: Agentic memory — search and summarize coding-agent sessions, plans, and memory across projects

entry.title: more-paper-workflow-pro-skill
entry.content: 中文/双语论文的证据闭环学术工作流：从定题、检索、下载、Zotero 到写作与引用审计，全程基于真实文献。

entry.title: workday-mcp
entry.content: Read-only Workday access for Claude — fetch your tasks, pay, benefits and compensation through your signed-in session

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: governed-second-brain
entry.content: A governed second brain for Claude Code — ONE plugin, two modes. Local (default): turn your own files into cited (qmd://) memory, every write run through deterministic governance and a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chained audit trail, in-process, no daemon, no network. Team (set TEAMKB_API_URL): query your team's single governed brain over the tailnet with a per-user token. Same /brain and /brain-save skills in both modes.

entry.title: sentio-ai-kit
entry.content: Skills for working with the Sentio platform — building blockchain data processors, running SQL queries, managing alerts, dashboards, and endpoints

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Personal development workflow for Claude Code: 8-step skill chain from ideation to shipping (ideate → product-plan → dev-plan → prototype → implement → qa → update-docs → ship), plus a task skill for small changes on shipped products, a next-step recommender, handoff, zoom-out, reusable subagents, and shared global rules.

entry.title: defect-scan
entry.content: Language-aware defect hunter: detect stack → triage → run real analyzers → reason with battle-tested patterns → report (confidence-tiered, tracker-correlated) → fix.

entry.title: sidecar
entry.content: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entry.title: harness-ops
entry.content: harness workflow automation

entry.title: mureo
entry.content: Your local-first AI ad ops crew for Google Ads, Meta Ads, Search Console & GA4. mureo sits on top of the official ad-platform MCPs, gates every change against your strategy, correlates outcomes locally, and keeps an auditable decision log — credentials never leave your machine.

entry.title: ryangannon-skills
entry.content: ryangannon-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: storm
entry.content: Convene a council of four engines (Claude + Codex + GLM + Gemini) on demand and synthesize one answer.

entry.title: heavyskill
entry.content: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness — spawns K independent parallel reasoning agents then performs critical sequential deliberation. Implementation of arXiv:2605.02396v1.

entry.title: claude-toolkit
entry.content: Commands, agents, scripts, and hooks for Claude Code development workflows

entry.title: renata
entry.content: RENATA — a product method that ties persona → metric → ADR → code. Record · Evidence · Name · Anchor · Test · Automate.

entry.title: fabric-dw
entry.content: Agent skills for Fabric Data Warehouse: query performance analysis, warehouse-wide performance investigation and tuning, and dbt project bootstrap.

entry.title: druckenmiller
entry.content: Daily Druckenmiller conviction analysis. Fetches today's conviction score, 4-signal breakdown, and position recommendation from a live data pipeline.

entry.title: sr-obsidian
entry.content: Obsidian 제텔카스텐 + 프로젝트 문서 관리 플러그인 — capture·study·wiki·radar·lint-wiki·daily·weekly·retro·scaffold·iss·hub·wbs·history·visualize·audit·migrate·search·archive·defuddle·canvas·obsidian-bases

entry.title: slint
entry.content: Enhances Claude's ability to work with, debug, and build Slint GUI applications

entry.title: vibe-center-skills
entry.content: Vibe Coding Control Center - Custom skills for session management

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: yalla
entry.content: Autonomous coding pipeline for Claude Code with guided onboarding dashboard: minimum-diff -> onboard -> track -> plan -> work -> test -> review -> compound -> ship. Multi-agent planning, proof contracts, and binary review gates.

entry.title: agent
entry.content: Turn Claude Code into a persistent agent — memory, personality, voice, messaging, and more.

entry.title: nuclear-grade
entry.content: Risk-graded context engineering for AI-assisted software work — a catalog of agent skills, paste-ready command prompts, and change-record templates that keep agent work questioned, controlled, and reviewable.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: craft
entry.content: Full-stack developer toolkit with integrated workflow automation - 115 commands (101 craft + 14 workflow), 8 agents, 39 skills with standardized dry-run preview mode (29 with --dry-run support). Code, git, site, docs, testing, architecture, CI, distribution, teaching workflows, planning, release pipeline, and ADHD-friendly features including brainstorming, task management, and spec capture

entry.title: nerdflair
entry.content: Nerd Font-powered statusline with configurable layout, color themes, progress bar flair, and audio chime notifications for Claude Code. Shows context usage, model, git branch, cost, and MCP servers.

entry.title: river-review
entry.content: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.

entry.title: pulp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Pulp audio framework — build, test, design, and ship audio plugins and apps

entry.title: acbc-skills
entry.content: acbc-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: clawbio
entry.content: Bioinformatics-native AI agent skill library — pharmacogenomics, ancestry, scRNA-seq, metagenomics, variant annotation, genome comparison, and more. 24 skills with deterministic Python execution, reproducibility bundles, and local-first privacy.

entry.title: jig
entry.content: Spec-driven, review-enforced, hook-gated AI-native development workflow for Claude Code

entry.title: claude-plugin-reference
entry.content: Claude Code plugin / skill / hooks の実機検証込みリファレンス

entry.title: jony
entry.content: Jony, a mobile-first UX design workflow: research → personas → IA → wireframes → copy → design system → Figma → Flutter

entry.title: unifable
entry.content: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: memcan
entry.content: Persistent memory for Claude Code — save and recall learnings, decisions, preferences across sessions.

entry.title: yule-agent-commands
entry.content: Yule 부서 에이전트의 슬래시 명령어 + 스킬 번들 (생성물). SSoT 는 agents/grants/slash-command-grants.json + 레지스트리 markdown.

entry.title: jaas
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate JaaS — evaluate Jsonnet over HTTP, and publish JsonnetSnippet / JsonnetLibrary resources as Flux ExternalArtifacts.

entry.title: awesome-agent-tools
entry.content: The hybrid marketplace for AI agent development: original skills, curated tools, and cross-platform support. Built for developers using AI agents.

entry.title: codey
entry.content: Live legibility for Claude Code: narrates what Claude is doing and warns when it's stuck.

entry.title: nexo-brain
entry.content: Local cognitive runtime for Claude Code — persistent memory, overnight learning, doctor diagnostics, personal scripts, recovery-aware jobs, startup preflight, and optional dashboard/power helper.

entry.title: gobbler
entry.content: Convert YouTube videos, web pages, documents, and audio to markdown. Control browsers via extension for NotebookLM, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and Gemini.

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: sogni-creative-agent
entry.content: Sogni Creative Agent: image, video, and music generation via Sogni AI's decentralized GPU network. Supports personas, persistent memories, style transfer, and multi-step creative workflows.

entry.title: forge
entry.content: A stage-by-stage workflow skill set (fg-*). A development loop that takes one task through a single cycle of ask·plan → execute → retro → done. Consists of fg-ask (inquiry/triage + grill-with-docs-style conversational grilling), fg-run (backlog selection menu · Run all, Dynamic Workflow execution), fg-learn (retro · doc promotion), and fg-done (done · seal · re-run guard), plus fg-map — an on-demand utility outside the loop that maps the codebase into .forge/codebase/ with parallel subagents so grilling reads a map instead of re-exploring the code (cuts context rot), and fg-quick — a lightweight lane outside the loop for trivial tasks that still grills lightly but skips formal artifacts (no ADR/plan/retro), records one line to .forge/quick/LOG.md, runs directly, and bails to fg-ask if the task turns out non-trivial, fg-status — a read-only reporter that surveys .forge/ and prints where every task stands plus the single next step you need (writes nothing, never auto-runs), fg-next — derives that same next step and runs it, announcing the step then invoking the skill rather than only reporting it (one-shot; fg-status reports, fg-next acts), with an 'all' mode (fg-next all) that drives backlog tasks to completion until empty, auto-progressing mechanical steps and halting at conversational walls, and fg-tdd — toggles persistent TDD mode in .forge/config.json (fg-ask then defaults to asking, fg-run runs test-first), and fg-eco — toggles eco mode in .forge/config.json (when on it activates loop-wide efficiency: fg-run caps its delegated workflow subagents at sonnet — lower only, the session model is untouched — and the embedded Eco laziness-first discipline in skills/fg-eco/ECO.md (code simplicity plus terse-communication output, caveman-derived) is injected into fg-run subagents, woven into fg-ask grilling as a YAGNI lens, and adopted by the current session — ADR-0014), and fg-loop — a goal-driven momentum loop with bounded replan: an initial conversational inquiry pins a machine-verifiable stop condition, an authorized fix-forward replan scope, and a replan cap (default 3 rounds) into .forge/loop.md, then it drives tasks unattended (run → UAT → auto-skip retro → seal, auto-selecting recommended defaults at every soft decision and asking the user nothing) until the checks pass, generating in-scope fix-forward tasks within the cap and halting only at the walls (unverifiable UAT, genuine fork, cap exhausted, no progress, check-tension oscillation, safety/irreversible action — ADR-0016). On a non-default git branch the whole forge state moves under .forge/branch/<branch>/ (git-tracked, namespaced so parallel branches never collide on .forge state — ADR-0011), and fg-merge — an outside-the-loop utility that, after you git merge a branch, integrates that branch's .forge/branch/<branch>/ into .forge/ (renumbering ADRs and rewriting cross-references, merging CONTEXT terms, folding done history, removing the branch folder; halts on genuine conflicts), and fg-cleanup — an outside-the-loop utility that retires stale or superseded ADRs to .forge/adr/retired/ on your approval, keeping the active decision set current without deleting the why (ADR-0012), and fg-statusline — an outside-the-loop setup utility that installs a bash fragment script reading .forge/ and wires it into settings.json so your terminal statusline shows the current loop progress (active task·stage, goal-loop indicator, or backlog count); since Claude Code allows only one statusLine it auto-wraps your existing one as an extra row rather than replacing it (ADR-0017), and fg-adversarial-review — an outside-the-loop utility that runs an optional adversarial review between fg-run and fg-learn: it assumes the result is wrong and fans out six lenses (failure points, hidden assumptions, misread requirements, security/performance/data-loss, unexpected misuse, weak decisions) as parallel workflow subagents, records findings to .forge/review.md, and on your approval turns fix-needed findings into a fix-forward plan to run again — optional, never a seal gate, always auto-skipped in unattended drives (ADR-0018), and fg-doctor — a read-only integrity health check (outside the loop) that surveys the .forge/ state contract and the docs/manifests and reports inconsistencies with a severity and an actionable fix hint each (orphaned run.md, broken/missing STATUS fields, slug-pairing mismatches, half-sealed done/, manifest version drift across the 3 places, README bilingual drift, skills missing from CLAUDE.md); it writes nothing and never auto-fixes — fg-status reports where you are, fg-doctor reports whether the state is healthy (ADR-0019), and fg-drop — an outside-the-loop utility that discards incomplete work you no longer want (a backlog plan, the active slot, an awaiting-retro task in executed/, or a halted goal loop): it lists the items with a per-item risk level (a checkbox dialog for ≤4, a numbered text list for ≥5), then a separate question to hard-delete (default, no trace) or archive to .forge/dropped/, behind a confirmation gate that warns already-run code is not reverted; it removes forge state only — never git, never your code — and a halted goal loop is dropped whole with its member tasks excluded from individual drop (ADR-0021), and fg-agents — an outside-the-loop utility that generates a project's domain agents by conversational grilling (outside any workflow): it derives the recurring, separable roles in the project and writes standard Claude Code subagent cards to .claude/agents/<role>.md, each description carrying a 'when to use' so fg-run can dispatch a matching role as agentType; the cards load at session start so they take effect only after a restart, and the whole path is graceful — a project with no domain agents runs exactly as before (ADR-0024). Use in contexts like 'start a new task', 'start with forge', 'let's work on this', 'refine the plan', 'map the codebase', 'forge quick', 'forge status', 'forge next', 'forge loop', 'forge tdd', 'forge eco', 'forge merge', 'forge cleanup', 'forge statusline', 'adversarial review', '적대적 리뷰', 'forge doctor', '무결성 검사', '상태 점검', 'forge drop', '작업 버리기', '계획 지워', 'forge agents', '도메인 에이전트 만들어', 'create project agents'.

entry.title: ultrapowers
entry.content: Autonomous, parallel, worktree-isolated execution of Superpowers plans via a committed Dynamic Workflow. Pairs with superpowers; invoke as /ultrapowers <plan-path> instead of subagent-driven-development.

entry.title: devin-handoff
entry.content: Hand off tasks to a cloud Devin session — VM, browser, shell, and full repo access. Create a session, get a URL, poll until done.

entry.content: AI-powered content lifecycle management for RHDP — from idea to ready-for-publishing

entry.content: Use Alva Agent for investing workflows: ask market questions with live financial context, set alerts, build or remix Playbooks, connect accounts, and backtest strategies on Alva Cloud.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: claude-tg — drive Claude Code from Telegram. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: eds-content-ops
entry.content: Content operations skills for AEM Edge Delivery Services: page auditing, GEO optimization, accessibility remediation, bulk metadata management, and content diffing. The first third-party content-ops skills for the EDS ecosystem.

entry.title: web-access
entry.content: Complete web browsing and automation skill for Claude Code - intelligent tool selection, CDP browser automation, and site experience accumulation

entry.title: cc-sciencepal
entry.content: SciencePal science research agents (stg + prd): start tasks, list/status/stop sessions, browse/download sandbox files

entry.title: project-lifecycle

entry.title: folio
entry.content: folio Layer 0 META FRAMEWORK — universal architecture spec-writing rules + Claude Code plugin harness. minimal scope = ADR-0003/0007: 1 skill + 6 hook + 7 script + 1 CLI.

entry.title: actionista
entry.content: GitHub Actions assistant - helps create, review, and optimize workflows with up-to-date action versions and best practices

entry.title: spark
entry.content: Spark repository development skills

entry.title: kerby
entry.content: kerby — the gate guardian for agentic coding. A loadable rule-corpus plus opt-in guardrail hooks that govern how an AI agent does coding work: clarity over cleverness, safety over speed, never leave the repo broken, and nothing unproven passes the gate. Load it into a session, reload after compaction, install per-project hooks, prepare an existing repo, or audit a repo's conformance to the rules.

entry.title: githits
entry.content: Code examples from global open source for developers and AI assistants

entry.title: frontend-visualqa
entry.content: Local visual QA for frontends with Yutori Navigator and Playwright

entry.title: larouex-fullstack-builder
entry.content: Complete Next.js + Azure/Railway full-stack website builder with 81 commands and 12 specialized agents including automated code review

entry.title: devkit
entry.content: Developer-environment skills for AI coding agents: install tools with mise, fall back to devenv.nix

entry.title: zs
entry.content: Agent-discipline skill framework: plans, fix-issues, draft-plan, run-plan, land-pr, and more.

entry.title: super-claudio
entry.content: Super Cláudio — curated skills for anything Claude can do: media creation, software development, webpage-from-slides, carreira-tech-slides, marketing, writing, design, productivity, AI/agents, and community skill discovery.

entry.title: career-ops
entry.content: AI job search command center — evaluate offers, generate CVs, scan portals, track applications

entry.title: mix
entry.content: Mix Flutter styling framework guidance for agents working on Mix code, projects using package:mix, and the Mix monorepo.

entry.title: forgekit
entry.content: Project-level workflow harness for Claude Code, Codex, and adjacent AI coding tools, with intent routing, report-only doc health and source trace checks, bounded loop policy, and opt-in native agent configuration templates.

entry.title: jahns-workflow
entry.content: SSOT-anchored agentic development workflow harness: one-click project setup, task registry with a global naming convention, zero-token roadmap rendering, round closeout, deterministic SHA-pinned review bundles + a ChatGPT reviewer kit, and external review ingestion.

entry.title: agency
entry.content: Harness-in-harness agency engine: code-mode capabilities (macroskills) over one provenance graph.

entry.title: capybaraa
entry.content: Calm senior-dev mode for Claude Code: one always-on mode that clarifies before code (curated ASCII questions and edge cases), stays lean, writes optimal code, spends tokens consciously, finishes terminally, and leaves the repo clean. A visible badge so you always know it is on.

entry.title: datasets
entry.content: Tilebox dataset skills for managing datasets, collections, datapoints, and schemas

entry.title: cbre-il-toolkit
entry.content: The CBRE Industrial & Logistics toolkit for Claude. Build polished, on-brand PowerPoint decks, turn a folder of property materials into an interactive longlist dashboard, draft I&L account briefings, map a company's warehouse and distribution network to an auditable Excel, and keep every word in the CBRE tone of voice.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 61 agents, 246 skills, 76 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: build-loop
entry.content: Multi-phase build orchestration with native debugging: assess, plan, execute, review, iterate. Plan-verify gate on Phase 2. Optional UI design gates. Native debug-loop, debugging-memory, and logging-tracer skills provide root-cause investigation without a bundled MCP server. Orchestrator owns when-to-fire; bundled skills own procedural detail; logging-tracer-bridge is an optional escalation hop to the standalone Coding Debugger supporting plugin for extended capability.

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: witty-diagnosis-agent
entry.content: An intelligent diagnostic agent for EulerOS system troubleshooting and analysis

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: A collection of project-agnostic skills for common engineering tasks such as ticket refinement, planning, code reviews, agent memory hygiene, skill authoring, and more.

entry.title: makepad-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entry.title: orchestration-kit
entry.content: Claude + Codex + Gemini 멀티AI 오케스트레이션 킷 — 설계·구현·검증 파이프라인 자동화

entry.title: autumn
entry.content: Domain knowledge, CLI wrappers, scaffolding commands, and code review for the autumn-web Rust framework

entry.title: ai-brain-starter
entry.content: Set up or upgrade an AI-powered Obsidian vault with journaling, knowledge graphs, pattern recognition, and meeting workflows. Includes skills for daily journaling, weekly insights, graphify knowledge graphs, humanizer, and more.

entry.title: ics-calendar
entry.content: Read and write your Mac Calendar (including iCloud) directly from Claude, via Apple's native EventKit framework. No credentials required.

entry.title: gcd
entry.content: Knowledge skill for Google Cloud Dedicated (GCD) - sovereign cloud platform. Provides guidance on GCD-specific services, authentication, Terraform, and key differences from public Google Cloud.

entry.title: serve-sim
entry.content: Control and stream a running iOS, iPad, or Apple Watch Simulator with serve-sim.

entry.title: shapeup-sdlc-plugin
entry.content: Shape Up SDLC harness for Claude Code: shaping, intake, orient, scope-mapping, building, evaluation and QA skills orchestrated by a tech-lead.

entry.title: basemind
entry.content: Full AI context layer over MCP — tree-sitter code-map, document RAG (PDF/Office/HTML/email + OCR + reranker), shared agent memory, on-demand web crawl, git history + blame + per-symbol diff. 300+ languages, 10+ coding-agent harnesses, content-addressed Fjall + LanceDB.

entry.title: t-tools
entry.content: DDD-driven development skills, sub-agents and workflow commands for Rust + React projects

entry.title: drydock
entry.content: Transforms Claude Code from raw code generation into a full idea-to-launch product system. 19 specialized agents cover architecture (12-Factor + Clean Architecture), API-first contracts, UX design, tested backend/frontend, observability & telemetry, security-by-default, CI/CD + supply-chain hardening, automated testing, performance budgets, feature flags, developer experience, per-product regulatory compliance (SOC 2 / GDPR / HIPAA / PCI-DSS) — plus security audit + VAPT (OWASP 2025 / API / LLM Top 10) — and go-to-market (marketing/growth, sales, customer success). 15 of the 19 agents run as real isolated subagents (auto-discovered from agents/) orchestrated via the Task tooling; the orchestrator and three planning agents run in-context as skills. Enterprise-grade by default and evidence-grounded with anti-hallucination guardrails.

entry.title: stageset
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate StageSet resources for the stageset-controller — ordered, gated, multi-stage Flux delivery.

entry.title: dure
entry.content: A project PM agent — converges requirements via deep interview, decomposes them into milestones/epics/issues, and tracks progress.

entry.title: discussion-tree
entry.content: Turn a single Claude Code session into a structured, parallel decision tree — answer discussion items independently in a browser mind-map and have the answers flow back over the MCP channel.

entry.title: draft
entry.content: Context-Driven Development: draft specs and plans before implementation. Structured workflows for features and fixes.

entry.title: fno
entry.content: Set a target. Say f[no] to mostly done.

entry.title: health-harness
entry.content: Mindbowser Health Harness — an agent-agnostic discipline for building healthcare products with AI: the Build Loop + healthcare-compliance guardrails. Packaged as Claude Code skills.

entry.title: claude-war-room
entry.content: Instant, reliable context for any legacy codebase — reverse-engineering into living docs, plus a multi-agent War Room to hunt down the risks.

entry.title: vatt-ghern
entry.content: Daily tech news skill for the vatt-ghern public blog (Eleventy + Cloudflare Pages). Drafts one roundup + several deep-story HTML posts per day, opens a PR for review.

entry.title: patina
entry.content: Detect and rewrite AI writing patterns in Korean, English, Chinese, and Japanese so text reads as if a human wrote it. Meaning-preservation (MPS) verified, audit-friendly. The root SKILL.md is loaded as the /patina skill.

entry.title: unleashed-mail
entry.content: Multi-agent development plugin for UnleashedMail — a native macOS 15+ email client supporting Gmail and Microsoft Graph, built with Swift 6, SwiftUI, AppKit, WKWebView, GRDB.swift (SQLCipher), and MVVM architecture. Ships 20 specialized agents, 17 auto-triggering skills, 3 orchestration commands, and a bundled deterministic review-synthesizer MCP server. Aligns agents with project's path-scoped rules (`.claude/rules/`) and defines cross-agent workflow contracts (AGENT_CONTRACTS.md).

entry.title: magician
entry.content: Full-stack SDLC plugin with dynamic project inspection, cross-session reference memory, self-learning, and parallel agent orchestration

entry.title: hephaestus
entry.content: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Ships 23 skills: skill-advisor, advise, learn, myrmidon-swarm, brainstorm, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification, git-worktrees, finish-branch, code-review, repo-analyze, repo-analyze-quick, repo-analyze-strict, repo-analyze-full, repo-analyze-quick-full, repo-analyze-strict-full, review-pr-strict, worktree-cleanup, tidy, create-reusable-utilities, github-actions-python-cicd, and python-repo-modernization.

entry.title: junjak-ai-harness
entry.content: TypeScript-first multi-agent team workflow harness for Claude Opus — greenfield project bootstrap (deep-research → scaffold → profile), 5-phase TDD workflow with agentic + human-QA testing layers, lifecycle-managed 3-bucket document storage with an LLM wiki, YAGNI code-minimalism, instinct-based learning, and ultracode Workflow orchestration

entry.title: pulseline
entry.content: High-performance multi-line statusline for Claude Code with setup commands and diagnostics

entry.title: product-view
entry.content: A conversational lens that keeps Claude in product-space — describing what the human on the other side of the screen experiences — until you explicitly ask to cross into code-space.

entry.title: epic
entry.content: 3 commands + 19 auto-trigger skills + self-evolving agent harness. Less to remember, more automation.

entry.title: codeledger
entry.content: ContextECF CodeLedger: deterministic context selection and agent governance for AI coding agents. Scores every file across 10 signals and delivers a minimal, ranked context bundle — so your agent reads the right files first. Install the CLI from @codeledger/cli, not the unrelated unscoped codeledger package.

entry.title: hunter
entry.content: Find and verify professional email addresses, search contacts by domain, and enrich company data -- directly in Claude.

entry.title: drt-hub
entry.content: Skills for drt — Reverse ETL for the code-first data stack

entry.title: ro
entry.content: Ronan's personal skills for development workflow, quality, browser/visual, research, audio/media, and project setup. Skills invoke as /ro:<skill-name>.

entry.title: Dev10x
entry.content: v0.81.1 — 69 skills for structured commits, PR lifecycle, branch hygiene, ticket management, task tracking, code review, scoping, and QA automation in Claude Code.

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning/half-cloning, context handoffs, research (Reddit and Hacker News), and Claude Code version checks

entry.title: pensmith
entry.content: Structured research-and-drafting assistant for academic papers — verifies every citation against the live source.

entry.title: leadbay
entry.content: AI lead discovery, qualification, and outreach prep on your Leadbay account.

entry.title: maos
entry.content: MAOS (Multi-Agent OS) - Coordination Framework for AI Agents with Orchestration, Sentinel Protocol, Worktree Governance, Status Maps, Forge Meta-Agent, Governance Protocols

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — session management, memory recall/save, and setup tools

entry.title: kernel
entry.content: Claude Code learns from itself. KERNEL gives your agent persistent memory (AgentDB), multi-agent orchestration (15 agents, tiered routing), and a scientific experiment engine that proves which rules actually work. Your agent remembers failures across sessions, coordinates parallel work without merge conflicts, and evolves its own methodology through hypothesis testing. 20 skills, 14 commands, auto-adapting project profiles. v7.21: adds the runaway-agent killswitch — a fail-open PreToolUse hook capping per-session tool calls + duration, with a save-work allowlist so work is never lost. The plugin stays general-purpose — project-specific session overlays live in the consuming repo's own hooks, not here.

entry.title: claude-plugin-security-risk
entry.content: Educational security demo — 23 post-install attack scenarios. See SAFETY.md before installing.

entry.title: starter
entry.content: Standardise les pratiques Python d'equipe : style, securite, tests, doc, pre-commit, init projet. Execution silencieuse par defaut, prompt-driven.

entry.title: collab-audit
entry.content: 13-section AI collaboration audit — analyzes actual work patterns (not surveys) to generate behavioral profile, blind spots, and growth direction.

entry.title: goal-lock
entry.content: Agent discipline engine — locks the goal, enforces PLAN-DO-VERIFY-FINALIZE-OUTPUT loop, detects 11 success masquerading patterns.

entry.title: code-autopsy
entry.content: 12Q quantified code review — 4-axis scoring (Security/Stability/Robustness/Operability), severity anchors, deployment verdict, factuality gate. Works as standalone prompt in any LLM

entry.title: freeze
entry.content: Declare the editable zone — everything outside is frozen. Prevents scope creep during implementation by locking untouched files.

entry.title: pre-push
entry.content: Mandatory pre-push pipeline — secrets scan (12 patterns), build/test gate, lint, parallel AI code review. Blocks push on Critical/High findings.

entry.title: scope
entry.content: Define what is IN, what is OUT, and exit criteria before implementation. Quick mode (3 questions) or Full mode (layered spec with ADR).

entry.title: session-start
entry.content: Session opener — loads handoff from last session, reviews lessons learned, runs health check, outputs ready signal with priority action.

entry.title: project-check
entry.content: Scan existing project across 4 dimensions: Infrastructure, Security, Quality, Harness. Returns scored gaps ordered by severity.

entry.title: session-checkpoint
entry.content: Session closer — saves context before compact. Handoff file, memory updates, lesson extraction, reflexion (what went wrong, what to improve).

entry.title: setup
entry.content: Claude Code infrastructure and agent team setup — rules, hooks, memory system, routing, and agent installation in one guided flow.

entry.title: project-init
entry.content: Interview-based project scaffolding for Claude Code — generates CLAUDE.md, ROADMAP, .gitignore, and .env.example from decisions, not templates.

entry.title: win-customers
entry.content: Understand buyers, package value, create demand, and sell. Validate ICP, Grand Slam Offer, $100M Leads, Breakthrough Advertising, Conversation-First Outreach, Challenger Sale, JOLT Effect, and Key Person of Influence help win customers end-to-end.

entry.title: apple-mail
entry.content: Manage Apple Mail through natural language - read, search, send, and organize emails (macOS only)

entry.title: exarchos
entry.content: A local-first SDLC workflow harness — structured, durable state for coding agents, with convergence gates, agent teams, and full audit trail.

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Obsidian vault integration for Claude Code. Auto-capture git commit context, auto-save sessions via background claude CLI summarizer, export conversations, create/retrieve notes, and auto-organize content.

entry.title: pragmatic-dev-toolkit
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the flat & pragmatic development workflow — workflow skills for alignment, execution and diagnosis; YAGNI/QA/security/doc/design reviewers; stack-aware test scaffolder (Python today); self-gated hooks; configurable path contract via CLAUDE.md.

entry.title: bench
entry.content: peerbench — a panel of AI reviewers (Codex + Kimi + GLM + Qwen + MiMo) for Claude Code: automatic gating reviews (plans, code turns, pushes), agentic read-only code review, and on-demand bug hunts. Commands are /bench:*.

entry.title: wire
entry.content: The Wire Framework — AI-accelerated data platform delivery for the full lifecycle: requirements, design, development, testing, deployment, enablement

entry.title: pi-stuff
entry.content: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: posthog
entry.content: Access PostHog analytics, feature flags, experiments, error tracking, and insights directly from your AI coding tool. Optionally capture Claude Code sessions to PostHog LLM Analytics.

entry.title: agent-factory
entry.content: A Praxis-backed agent factory: a single-agent plan -> execute -> verify loop with compounding memory, delivered as Claude Code skills. Coding-first behind a general task+oracle seam.

entry.title: claude-workflow
entry.content: Workflow enforcement for Claude Code skills. Adds a Stop hook that blocks session completion until all defined workflow steps are finished.

entry.title: knowledge-skills
entry.content: Autonomous knowledge management skills for keeping AI context files up to date

entry.title: codeforge
entry.content: + CFP-2412 (2026-06-25) — whitelist↔manifest↔templates 3-way 일관성 CI gate 신설 (Epic CFP-2394 Story D, 최종): consumer-applicability 삼각 일관성(whitelist 28 ↔ templates/github-workflows/ ↔ manifest 49 closure) warning-tier CI gate. 방향1(whitelist→templates 실존 전수 miss=FAIL) + 방향2(manifest dep→whitelist subset) + 방향3(whitelist→manifest closure-asset 등재완전성, AM-3 run:-block-aware 추출) + depth-2(hard-exit 데이터 dep). graceful=data-absence 스크립트 EXIT 0(path-filter/on.paths skip 금지=required Pending trap 회피) + setup-error fail-closed exit 2. check_whitelist_manifest_3way.py Python SSOT(ReDoS-safe) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow(injection-safe pull_request) + 15 fixture discriminating test(mutation 생존 0). evidence-checks-registry 77→78 + label-registry-v2 v2.98→v2.99(hotfix-bypass:whitelist-manifest-3way 99 member). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-130 §결정3 closure ENFORCEMENT 적용). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.36.0 → 6.37.0 MINOR (신규 governance lint gate 활성화 = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2408 (2026-06-25) — consumer-applicability full closure manifest 등록 (Epic CFP-2394 Story B): consumer-applicable workflow 의 full closure(scripts+데이터+정책doc)를 templates/consumer-scripts.manifest 에 등록(16→49 entry, additions-only). Check 4 확장자-인지 면제(.tsv 데이터/.mjs import-only ESM 의 exec-bit 면제 + 이중확장 .sh.tsv 류 strict 우선 방어) + 22 script git index mode +x normalize + 6 fixture mutation-kill. ADR-130 closure-완전성 규칙(§결정5-A 채널=templates/github-workflows) 적용. required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.35.0 → 6.36.0 MINOR (consumer 33 script 추가 배포 + Check 4 면제 runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2383 (2026-06-20) — spawn-prompt-fact-verify 게이트 mechanical wire (ADR-082 Amendment 37 §결정 1 layer 1 sub-scope 1-Z, sub-scope 1-L CFP-1590 carrier): worker→worker handoff spawn prompt PR-body-proxy 안 C1-C5 fact category (C1 counter / C2 version / C3 SHA / C4 verify-result / C5 file-existence) inherit fact 단언 시 동일-window [verified-via:] annotation presence lint (warning-tier). 4 sub-source inherit fact (사용자 발화 / sibling Issue body / sister PR commit message / 별 carrier retro file). 삭제된 1-W source (c84fadf3) C1-C5 PATTERNS 이식 + S2 (CFP-2382) issue-body-claim-pre-screen 구조 답습 (line-by-line in_fence toggle + strip_inline_code + PER_BLOCK_SCAN_CAP=50 + ANNOTATION_MARKER 정적 substring + exit 0=PASS/1=FLAG/2=SETUP) + PR-event trigger (pull_request opened/synchronize/reopened, tier-downgrade-guard.yml 선례 답습 — carrier workflow = spawn-prompt-fact-verify.yml). check_spawn_prompt_fact_verify.py Python SSOT (ReDoS-safe anchored bounded-quantifier regex, nested quantifier 0) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow + self-contained discriminating test. injection-safe (pull_request NOT pull_request_target / permissions contents:read,pull-requests:read / env-injection only — run inline 보간 금지, fork-PR shell injection 차단). PR-body-proxy 한계 명시 (실 spawn prompt 아닌 proxy, transcribe 케이스만 검출) → warning-tier advisory (위조 false-PASS 구조적 가능, 보안 통제 신뢰 금지). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변) + label-registry-v2 v2.98 MINOR (hotfix-bypass:spawn-prompt-fact-verify 115번째 family member, 1-W name 충돌 회피). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.33.0 → 6.34.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2382 (2026-06-20) — issue-body-claim-pre-screen 게이트 mechanical wire (ADR-082 Amendment 20 §결정 15, CFP-1559 carrier): orchestrator-authored followup Issue body 안 4 sub-pattern (PR state / CFP state / count / sister carrier) stale-claim 을 동일-line [verified-via:] annotation presence 로 write-time pre-screen (warning-tier). Wave 1 declarative anchor(CFP-1559)의 Wave 2 wire. check_issue_body_claim_pre_screen.py Python SSOT (line-by-line in_fence toggle masking + inline code-span strip — fenced 내부 빈줄 fragmentation 0, ReDoS-safe anchored regex) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow (on:issues opened/edited, R1 scope predicate = codeforge-improvement AND (type:improvement OR title [CFP-FU/[CFP][FU), story-init.yml 답습) + self-contained discriminating test (23 TC, mutation 생존 0). count enum 한글 확장 (건/개/곳/줄/회/어휘 — ordinal-모호 번/항목/차례 제외, FP 보수) + 구조화 FLAG message (pattern/line/claim/hint). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.32.0 → 6.33.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2381 (2026-06-20) — deferred-followup reconcile 게이트 (ADR-060 Amendment 18 §결정 32): §결정 19 auto_blocking 라벨의 mechanical forcing function 신설. '임계 초과 + auto_blocking + 전용 carrier 부재' evidence-checks-registry entry 자동 검출 + 강제 action 3택 (배선/강등/폐기, warning-tier). carrier-부재 = detect_command OR workflow 경로 파일 ABSENT (닫힌집합 + fail-loud 경로추출, status-agnostic broad criterion, 2-root parity). self-validation test job (다형 fixture mutation 생존 0) + STALE 2 status flip (bootstrap-labels-precondition + schema-change-7-principles-self-check) + 16번째 registry self-entry. required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.31.0 → 6.32.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2377 (2026-06-20) — 완료 단계 정식화 (ADR-128 + ADR-040 Amd9 + ADR-045 Amd13): merge 직후 wrap-up 을 정식 '완료 단계' 로 격상. (갭 A) backstop GC 자동 트리거 복원 = hooks.json SessionEnd async dispatch 단일 wire (hooks/session-end → check-worktree-stale.sh background GC, 문서-실배선 drift 복원 — SessionStart async 무시·동기 지연 회귀라 배제, 트리거 단일화 invariant = Stop 동시 wire 금지) + phase:완료 worktree-clean self-check 신규 (scripts/check-worktree-completion-clean.sh, eager 미실행 검출 게이트, F2 sub-worktree vs Story root mergedAt 구분 계약, fail-safe 4종 상속, warning-tier + workflow:null local-only — required CI 불가). (갭 B) 4-트리거 (post-merge-followup / retro-mandatory / GitOpsAgent eager / phase:완료) 수렴 SSOT = playbook §9.7.2 명문화 (신규 SSOT 0, 클라우드↔로컬 비대칭 = 절차+텔레메트리 조합). (갭 C) Living Architecture / Confluence mirror 재정합 = 유예 (ADR-112/111 owner pointer). 신규 lane 0 / required check 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-024 Amd19 §B 정합) / process-skip 채널 0 (ADR-127 ratchet 정합). 6.30.0 → 6.31.0 MINOR (SessionEnd hook 신규 + 완료-게이트 기능). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). Claude Code 범용 SW 개발 오케스트레이션 플러그인. 0 core 에이전트 (wrapper-only) · 8 레인 + CI gate + role:dev 동적 roster 로 요구사항 접수부터 배포 리뷰 통과까지 자율 실행

entry.title: Titan
entry.content: Pensar, fazer e passar o bastão: cinco skills chamáveis individualmente. planejar (metodologia completa pra desenhar produto/software novo do zero antes de codar), auto-think (modo largar-e-esquecer pra ESTUDAR um problema difícil — pesquisa, estuda de vários ângulos, confronta os achados com o Codex, verifica e entrega uma ou mais soluções com veredito; não executa), auto-worker (modo largar-e-esquecer em que o Claude EXECUTA a tarefa e o Codex confronta o trabalho antes de fechar, com protocolo de segurança e verificação embutido), handoff (gera documento de passagem de bastão pra continuar o trabalho numa sessão nova do zero) e gpt-optimizer (revisor adversarial on-demand via Codex GPT-5.5 que te faz refletir sobre uma decisão no meio da conversa — o GPT tenta derrubar, advogado do diabo; sem precisar de plano, PR ou código formal; quando o veredito é Seguir, oferece executar com a auto-worker). A auto-think estuda e recomenda; quem executa a solução escolhida é a auto-worker. A planejar pode, no fim, oferecer disparar a auto-worker pra executar o plano — opcional, nunca automático. Repo-agnóstico — serve pra qualquer projeto.

entry.title: skill-governance-archive
entry.content: Archived 2026-04-27. Point-in-time experiment in Claude skill governance. See README for lessons learned and recommended replacements (Cisco skill-scanner, plugin distribution, Anthropic enterprise controls).

entry.title: whitebox-testing
entry.content: White-box testing skill with path coverage, cyclomatic complexity, decision-path analysis, dataflow path coverage, and test generation for Python/JS/Java/C.

entry.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entry.content: UI/UX design intelligence. 84 styles, 161 palettes, 73 font pairings, 25 charts, 17 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Laravel, JavaFX, Three.js). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entry.title: teacher-operating-system
entry.content: Teacher Operating System (TOS): a hub-and-spoke ecosystem of governed K-12 teacher skills that generate, validate, differentiate, route, and maintain educational artifacts. Skills under skills/ are auto-discovered; shared engines (standards, context, connectors, students, records, docintel, routing, traversal, health) provide the governed core. Offline/stdlib; decision-support with human_review_required; placeholders only in the repo.

entry.title: writing
entry.content: Opinionated writing skills for Obsidian, tuned for cryptography and mathematics

entry.title: piflow
entry.content: Pi Flow — author, enhance, and run structured filesystem-coordinated workflows (a DAG of producer/verify nodes) as a fleet of efficient pi agents driven by non-Claude coding-plan models, with Claude Code as the single console. Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).

entry.title: korean-dart
entry.content: OpenDART 83개 API → 15개 MCP 도구. 금융감독원 전자공시(DART) 기반 AI 리서치 — 공시 검색·재무·XBRL + 버핏 애널리스트 프레임(insider_signal · disclosure_anomaly · buffett_quality_snapshot) + HWP/PDF 첨부 마크다운화

entry.title: rapid-sustainability-risk
entry.content: Rapid Sustainability Risk Assessment (RSRA / Aris) — embed energy transition and decarbonization analysis directly into real estate acquisition underwriting. Produces a phased Decarb Plan, Energy & Emissions Profile, Deal Signal, and targeted Seller Questions from any OM, PCA, or ESG DD report.

entry.title: goldfish
entry.content: Cross-client MCP memory with checkpoints, recall, briefs, and standups for AI-assisted development

entry.title: svaha
entry.content: Claude Code that picks up exactly where it left off — frozen cross-session handoffs, a self-watching context budget, coherence guardrails, and an optional operator decision layer.

entry.title: data-liberation
entry.content: Extract content from closed web platforms (GoDaddy Websites & Marketing, Hostinger, HubSpot, Shopify, Squarespace, Webflow, Weebly, Wix) into WordPress-compatible WXR files. Inspect, extract, QA, and import to WordPress.

entry.title: iterm2-tab-status
entry.content: Show iTerm2 tab status (running/idle/attention) for Claude Code sessions

entry.title: claude-code-statusline
entry.content: Multi-provider statusline for Claude Code — DeepSeek ¥ tracking, opencode go subscription usage, Anthropic context bar. TrueColor gradient, git porcelain, code churn.

entry.title: devkit
entry.content: Local-dev coordination skills for devkit: file locks, ports, dev servers, issue lifecycle

entry.title: visual-planner
entry.content: Browser-reviewable, iterable planning for Claude Code and Codex. Generate a plan as a local markdown file, review it in a polished browser UI, leave comments, and iterate revision-by-revision with visual diffs.

entry.title: shippo
entry.content: Ship packages with Shippo. Multi-carrier rate shopping, label generation, package tracking, address validation, customs declarations, and batch processing from CSV files.

entry.title: open-skills
entry.content: 开放技能库：工作流、性能优化、Jira、Git 等 Claude Code Skills

entry.title: code-quality-atlas
entry.content: A research-derived suite of 33 code-review and maintenance skills covering correctness, readability, structure, security, performance, tests, migrations, accessibility, observability, LLM and agentic/tool-use safety, install/upgrade experience, authored-artifact conventions (e.g. SKILL.md), and repo-wide audits (architecture, dependencies, config, docs, compliance), plus a router that picks the right lenses for a given change or design doc and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict. Each skill is generated from a verified research atlas with provenance, refined examples, and cross-model evals.

entry.title: sealos
entry.content: Deploy local or GitHub projects to Sealos Cloud, connect cloud databases and S3 object storage, generate Dockerfiles and Sealos templates, assess cloud-native readiness, and build Sealos Desktop apps.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: greennode-agentbase
entry.content: Full GreenNode AgentBase lifecycle: scaffold → configure → deploy → monitor → teardown. 10 skills including /agentbase-wizard, /agentbase-deploy, /agentbase-monitor.

entry.title: harness-claude
entry.content: Harness for Claude Code — skills, /harness:* slash commands, persona subagents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP tools without per-repo `harness setup`. Sibling plugins exist for Cursor, Gemini CLI, and Codex.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: javascript-typescript
entry.content: JavaScript and TypeScript development with ES6+, Node.js, React, and modern web frameworks

entry.title: vd
entry.content: A daily-driver collection of skills for agentic coding, namespaced under `vd:` to avoid conflicts with other plugins.

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.
